raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on improving the grammar, flow, register, and conciseness of the run-on sentences and paragraphs in the provided paper draft section, making it the load-bearing responsibility.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral nice-to-have in cleaning up the draft to ensure any limitations or variabilities are appropriately highlighted.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to the cleaning task, helping to tone down any potentially exaggerated statements in the polished text.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is a nice-to-have aspect to maintain the draft's focus during cleanup without introducing extraneous content.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, ensuring the description of the retrieval framework does not inadvertently promote misuse.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is a nice-to-have to verify that mentions of tools and datasets in the draft are properly attributed during cleanup."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on improving the grammar, flow, register, and conciseness of the run-on sentences and paragraphs in the provided paper draft section, making it the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral nice-to-have in cleaning up the draft to ensure any limitations or variabilities are appropriately highlighted.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to the cleaning task, helping to tone down any potentially exaggerated statements in the polished text.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a nice-to-have aspect to maintain the draft's focus during cleanup without introducing extraneous content.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, ensuring the description of the retrieval framework does not inadvertently promote misuse.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a nice-to-have to verify that mentions of tools and datasets in the draft are properly attributed during cleanup.
